tagline: Quantify every trade with probability math

steps.description: Current price field fills with a realistic asset price, setting the baseline for all calculations
Position size updates to 10, scaling all expected value outputs accordingly
Price target and probability table comes into full view, revealing the input rows for targets and probabilities
Take-profit target price filled in, pairing with a probability to define the upside scenario
Expected value result appears with a clear positive or negative EV score and breakdown by scenario
